summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Onspotly landing page - all backend APIs, frontend components, form integrations, and mobile responsiveness working perfectly
passed_tests: Root API endpoint (GET /api/) responding correctly
Waitlist submission (POST /api/waitlist) working with all fields
Waitlist count (GET /api/waitlist/count) returning accurate counts
Shooter application (POST /api/shooter-apply) accepting valid submissions
Form validation rejecting invalid data (422 status)
Hero section with headline, subheading, CTA buttons, badge
Navbar with logo, navigation links, Join Waitlist button
How It Works section displaying all 7 steps correctly
Audience section showing all 5 audience cards
Features section with all 4 before/after comparisons
Pricing section displaying 3 tiers ($49, $129, $199)
US Map section with all 5 launch cities (Charlotte, Raleigh, Austin, Dallas, Houston)
Become Shooter form fully functional with backend integration
Waitlist form fully functional with backend integration
Footer with all links and contact email hello@onspotlyapp.com
Privacy Policy page accessible at /privacy route
Smooth scroll navigation to all sections
Mobile responsive design working perfectly
Mobile menu functionality
Form submissions working on both mobile and desktop
Real-time waitlist count updates
Success message display after form submissions
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (22/22 features working)
